text: 459 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ أَخَذَ بِقَوَائِمِ اَلسَّرِيرِ غَفَرَ اَللَّهُ لَهُ خَمْساً وَ عِشْرِينَ كَبِيرَةً وَ إِذَا رَبَّعَ خَرَجَ مِنَ اَلذُّنُوبِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.459 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Whoever takes hold of the handles of the bier, Allah (swt) will forgive twenty-five major sins for them. And if they carry it on all four sides, they will be cleansed of their sins."
